scenarios.description: children() builds list but returns empty when only TextNode children (childNodeSize>0, no Element instances)
scenarios.precondition: Element has one or more TextNode children but no Element children
pseudocode: TEST TC07 children with only TextNode children

scenarios.description: children() returns same cached list after non-structural attribute mutation (cache preserved)
scenarios.precondition: Element has two Element children, shadowChildrenRef built on first children()
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() returns same instance as first
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children cache persists after attribute change

scenarios.description: children() rebuilds cache when previous cache referent is cleared (WeakReference.get()==null)
scenarios.precondition: Element has three Element children and initial cache built via children(); Reflection to clear shadowChildrenRef referent
scenarios.expectedResult: after referent cleared, children() returns a new list instance with same elements
pseudocode: TEST TC09 children rebuilds after WeakReference referent cleared
